---
title: "[data name]"
author: "[Full Name]"
format: html
engine: knitr
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Load necessary libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)
library(gganimate)
```

## Dataset Selected

\[Describe which dataset you chose from the list\]

## Introduction

\[Explain what the dataset is about, variables included, and how data was generated\]

## Interactive Plot(s)

\[Add your plotly code and explanation here\]

## Animation(s)

## \[Add your gganimate code and explanation here\]
